pilot_tasks.name: CV Feature Classification (Pilot)
pilot_tasks.description: Classify absorbed features into high-CV (CV > 1.0) and low-CV (CV <= 1.0) groups on GPT-2 layer 6 SAE. Target 30+ features in each group.
pilot_tasks.pass_criteria: At least 30 features in each CV group (high/low)

pilot_tasks.name: Steering Comparison by CV (Pilot)
pilot_tasks.description: Test steering on 30 high-CV vs 30 low-CV absorbed features at +5 strength. Measure logit change at semantically appropriate tokens.
pilot_tasks.pass_criteria: High-CV steering effect > Low-CV with p < 0.05

pilot_summary.gate_criteria: Both pilots must pass to proceed to full experiments
